dailyOperatingSequence.title: Refresh leads and proposals
dailyOperatingSequence.reason: Pull public sources, score leads, and refresh local drafts.

dailyOperatingSequence.title: Open the cockpit
dailyOperatingSequence.reason: Rank the next human actions before doing manual work.

dailyOperatingSequence.title: Clear blockers first
dailyOperatingSequence.reason: Contact enrichment unlocks audits and outreach.

dailyOperatingSequence.title: Move revenue actions
dailyOperatingSequence.reason: Audit and proposal actions create the strongest conversion path.

dailyOperatingSequence.title: Record manual outcomes
dailyOperatingSequence.command: npm run lead:sent -- --id <leadId> --channel linkedin --note "Sent first DM"
dailyOperatingSequence.reason: Outreach history drives follow-up timing and review accuracy.
